reviewTrigger: critical journey, app command, runbook, environment, or authority change

commands.command: run the named Sendblue procedure only after its authority gate
commands.externalReadback: required for a proved external packet; otherwise inconclusive

commands.environment: local fixtures or approval-gated external target
commands.command: bun run --filter @bundjil/agent test && bun run --filter @bundjil/codex-proxy test
commands.externalReadback: required only for a claimed external condition

commands.command: run the named Executor read-only procedure only after its authority gate
commands.externalReadback: required for a proved external packet; unavailable is inconclusive

commands.command: run the named Executor resume only after its authority gate
commands.externalReadback: required for Executor and downstream target

commands.environment: local synthetic snapshot; external Preview or Production work remains approval-gated
commands.externalReadback: required for Preview or Production claim; Preview never establishes Production

commands.command: bun run --filter @bundjil/agent test && bun run --filter @bundjil/codex-proxy test
commands.externalReadback: required before and after an external containment/recovery claim

commands.environment: approval-gated Photon Preview or Production target
commands.command: run the named Photon procedure only after its management, ingress, and outbound authority gates
commands.externalReadback: required for provider acceptance; handset delivery and typing display require separate observation

commands.command: run the staged promotion procedure, then the named Sendblue and Photon procedures
commands.externalReadback: required for Vercel and both providers; each handset observation remains separate
